formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Since Natural Vegetation does not involve complex mathematical formulas, I have included key statements and concepts in the format you requested. Here's the JSON array for CBSE Class 11 Geography — Natural Vegetation:

[
  {
    "name": "Vegetation types based on climate",
    "formula": "Tropical, Subtropical, Temperate, Montane, and Alpine",
    "variables": "Types of climate",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Classifying natural vegetation based on climate conditions"
  },
  {
    "name": "Formation of Mangrove Vegetation",
    "formula": "Salt-tolerant plants found in coastal areas with high salinity",
    "variables": "Salt-tolerant plants and high salinity",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Unique formation of mangroves in coastal regions"
  },
  {
    "name": "Types of Rainforests",
    "formula": "Tropical Rainforests, Tropical Monsoon Rainforests, and Temperate Rainforests",
    "variables": "Types of climate and geographical conditions",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Classification of rainforests based on climate and geography"
  },
  {
    "name": "Factors Influencing Natural Vegetation",
    "formula": "Climate, Topography, Soil, and Water",
    "variables": "Climate, Topography, Soil, and Water",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key factors influencing the growth and distribution of natural vegetation"
  },
  {
    "name": "Biome Classification",
    "formula": "Terrestrial Biomes (Deserts, Grasslands, Tropical Rainforests, Temperate Rainforests, and Coniferous Forests) and Aquatic Biomes (Freshwater and Marine)",
    "variables": "Types of biomes",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Classification of biomes based on geographical and climatic conditions"
  },
  {
    "name": "Types of Grasslands",
    "formula": "Temperate Grasslands, Tropical Grasslands, and Alpine Grasslands",
    "variables": "Climate and geographical conditions",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Classification of grasslands based on climate and geography"
  },
  {
    "name": "Factors Affecting the Distribution of Vegetation",
    "formula": "Topography, Climate, Soil, and Water",
    "variables": "Topography, Climate, Soil, and Water",
    "units": "",
    "notes": "Key factors influencing the distribution of natural vegetation"
  }
]

Note: Since Natural Vegetation is a chapter focused on concepts and descriptions, I have included key statements and concepts in the JSON array.
